feature.name: pytest ini markers parsing
feature.description: Extract pytest ini markers linelist parsing and marker line normalization.
included_behaviors: parse multiline ini markers values into linelist entries
split marker lines into name and description (strip name; preserve description whitespace)
MarkerRegistry preserves marker declaration order from ini lines
excluded_behaviors: full Config initialization and plugin loading

entanglement.description: Ini marker definitions accumulate via config linelist merging across plugins and pytest.ini.
signals: linelist ini type coerces multiline strings
addinivalue_line appends to cached marker registry

output.import: from featurelifted import MarkerRegistry, parse_linelist, split_marker_line
